languages.text: Под управлением сво{mf|его|ей} влады{mf|ки|чицы} 32-ой меровский полк превратился в идеальное оружие — армию-культ, славящуюся извращенной дисциплиной и хитростью.
Under the command of its ruler, the 32nd Merov Regiment became the perfect weapon, an armed cult infamous for its twisted discipline and cunning.
languages.original_text: Под управлением сво{mf|его|ей} влады{mf|ки|чицы} 32-ой меровский полк превратился в идеальное оружие — армию-культ, славящуюся извращенной дисциплиной и хитростью.

traits.locale_text: Under the command of its ruler, the 32nd Merov Regiment became the perfect weapon, an armed cult infamous for its twisted discipline and cunning.
Under the command of its ruler, the 32nd Merov Regiment became the perfect weapon, an armed cult infamous for its twisted discipline and cunning.
Under the command of its ruler, the 32nd Merov Regiment became the perfect weapon, an armed cult infamous for its twisted discipline and cunning.

languages.text: 32番目のメロフ連隊は、その統治者によって指揮され、完璧な兵器へと変貌した。その軍隊は、歪んだ規律と狡猾さで悪名高い武装教団だった。
languages.original_text: Under the command of its ruler, the 32nd Merov Regiment became the perfect weapon, an armed cult infamous for its twisted discipline and cunning.

traits.locale_text: 32番目のメロフ連隊は、その統治者によって指揮され、完璧な兵器へと変貌した。その軍隊は、歪んだ規律と狡猾さで悪名高い武装教団だった。

languages.text: 在其统治者的指挥下，梅罗夫第32团成为了完美武器——一个以扭曲的纪律与狡诈著称的武装教派。
languages.original_text: Under the command of its ruler, the 32nd Merov Regiment became the perfect weapon, an armed cult infamous for its twisted discipline and cunning.

traits.locale_text: 在其统治者的指挥下，梅罗夫第32团成为了完美武器——一个以扭曲的纪律与狡诈著称的武装教派。

languages.text: Sous le commandement de {mf|son dirigeant|sa dirigeante}, le 32e régiment de Merov devint l'arme parfaite : une secte armée réputée pour sa discipline retorse et sa ruse.
languages.original_text: Under the command of its ruler, the 32nd Merov Regiment became the perfect weapon, an armed cult infamous for its twisted discipline and cunning.

traits.locale_text: Sous le commandement de {mf|son dirigeant|sa dirigeante}, le 32e régiment de Merov devint l'arme parfaite : une secte armée réputée pour sa discipline retorse et sa ruse.

languages.text: Bajo el mando de su líder, el 32.º regimiento de Merov se convirtió en un arma perfecta, un culto armado infame por su disciplina retorcida y su astucia.
languages.original_text: Under the command of its ruler, the 32nd Merov Regiment became the perfect weapon, an armed cult infamous for its twisted discipline and cunning.

traits.locale_text: Bajo el mando de su líder, el 32.º regimiento de Merov se convirtió en un arma perfecta, un culto armado infame por su disciplina retorcida y su astucia.

languages.text: Hükümdarlarının komutası altındaki 32. Merov Alayı, çarpık disiplini ve kurnazlığıyla ün salmış silahlı bir tarikat olan mükemmel bir silaha dönüştü.
languages.original_text: Under the command of its ruler, the 32nd Merov Regiment became the perfect weapon, an armed cult infamous for its twisted discipline and cunning.

traits.locale_text: Hükümdarlarının komutası altındaki 32. Merov Alayı, çarpık disiplini ve kurnazlığıyla ün salmış silahlı bir tarikat olan mükemmel bir silaha dönüştü.

languages.text: Unter dem Kommando {mf|seines Herrschers|seiner Herrscherin} wurde das 32. Merov-Regiment die perfekte Waffe, ein bewaffneter Kult, der für seine Disziplin und Kühnheit berüchtigt war.
languages.original_text: Under the command of its ruler, the 32nd Merov Regiment became the perfect weapon, an armed cult infamous for its twisted discipline and cunning.

traits.locale_text: Unter dem Kommando {mf|seines Herrschers|seiner Herrscherin} wurde das 32. Merov-Regiment die perfekte Waffe, ein bewaffneter Kult, der für seine Disziplin und Kühnheit berüchtigt war.
